
### calling things encryption  {.smaller}


* in this class, <i>(symmetric) encryption</i> means confidentiality but not authenticity 

   * has malleability problem: attacker can generate a new, valid ciphertext without knowing <code>key</code>.

* matches most common thing a library calls encryption 
<hr class="vspace" />
* but, sometimes encryption will be ‘‘authenticated encryption’’ 

   * encryption + message authentication code
